1: And the answer of the tongue, is is from the LORD LORD .
2: But the LORD LORD weigheth the spirits.
3: And thy thoughts shall be established.
4: Yea, even the wicked for the day of evil.
5: Though Though hand join join in hand, he shall not be unpunished.
6: And by the fear of the LORD LORD men men depart from evil.
7: He maketh even his enemies to be at peace with him.
9: But the LORD LORD directeth his steps.
10: His mouth transgresseth not in judgment.
11: All the weights of the bag are are his work.
12: For the throne is established by righteousness.
13: And they love him that speaketh right.
14: But a wise man will pacify it.
15: And his favour is is as a cloud of the latter rain.
16: And to get understanding rather to be chosen than silver!
17: He that keepeth his way preserveth his soul.
18: And an haughty spirit before a fall.
19: Than to divide the spoil with the proud.
20: And whoso trusteth in the LORD LORD , happy is is he.
21: And the sweetness of the lips increaseth learning.
22: But the instruction of fools is is folly.
23: And addeth learning to his lips.
24: Sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.
25: But the end thereof are are the ways of death.
26: For his mouth craveth it of him.
27: And in his lips there is there is as a burning fire.
28: And a whisperer separateth chief friends.
29: And leadeth him into the way that is that is not good.
30: Moving his lips he bringeth evil to pass.
31: If If it be found in the way of righteousness.
32: And he that ruleth his spirit than he that taketh a city.
33: But the whole disposing thereof is is of the LORD LORD .
